title: Security Configuration
description:
Security Configuration

Security Configuration

Epson RC+ 8.0 requires a path for security files. If you have more than one system on a network, it is recommended that you setup the security files path for all systems to store the security logs in a server on the network.

To administer Epson RC+ 8.0 security:

Start
	 Epson RC+ 8.0.

Select
	 [Setup]-[System Configuration].

Select
	 [Security].

On
	 the [General] tree, type in the path for your security files or click
	 the [Browse] button.

Select
	 [Users].

To
	 add a user, click the [New] button.

Each new user belongs to the Guest group by default. Click in the group field, then click the dropdown button to select the desired group.
